## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss GrowthX's proposal for expanded services and increased value to Teero, including programmatic SEO and lead generation strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/JDDNNAzrycqzH8K3ehorHPZhJArJCwk8?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX proposes a $18K/month package including editorial, programmatic SEO, and lead magnets](https://fathom.video/share/JDDNNAzrycqzH8K3ehorHPZhJArJCwk8?tab=summary&timestamp=1625.0)
  - [Teero is interested but needs more concrete examples and details on programmatic SEO implementation](https://fathom.video/share/JDDNNAzrycqzH8K3ehorHPZhJArJCwk8?tab=summary&timestamp=1761.0)
  - [GrowthX emphasizes their ability to handle end-to-end programmatic content creation, including data scraping and QA](https://fathom.video/share/JDDNNAzrycqzH8K3ehorHPZhJArJCwk8?tab=summary&timestamp=1813.0)
  - [Both parties agree to follow up with more examples and potential volume estimates](https://fathom.video/share/JDDNNAzrycqzH8K3ehorHPZhJArJCwk8?tab=summary&timestamp=1960.0)

## Topics

### Teero's Current Growth and Expansion

  - [Teero has launched in the Northeast U.S. and is gearing up for Texas expansion](https://fathom.video/share/JDDNNAzrycqzH8K3ehorHPZhJArJCwk8?tab=summary&timestamp=72.0)
  - [Company moved into a new office and is experiencing continued growth](https://fathom.video/share/JDDNNAzrycqzH8K3ehorHPZhJArJCwk8?tab=summary&timestamp=42.0)
  - [Chose Austin as their U.S. hub, beating out New York and Chicago](https://fathom.video/share/JDDNNAzrycqzH8K3ehorHPZhJArJCwk8?tab=summary&timestamp=86.0)

### GrowthX's Recent Developments

  - [Raised $12 million Series A at a healthy valuation](https://fathom.video/share/JDDNNAzrycqzH8K3ehorHPZhJArJCwk8?tab=summary&timestamp=144.0)
  - [Grew from 20 to 60 employees in two months](https://fathom.video/share/JDDNNAzrycqzH8K3ehorHPZhJArJCwk8?tab=summary&timestamp=472.0)
  - [Approaching $8 million in ARR with 50 customers](https://fathom.video/share/JDDNNAzrycqzH8K3ehorHPZhJArJCwk8?tab=summary&timestamp=148.0)
  - [Developed an AI-powered workflow engine and runtime layer for efficient content creation](https://fathom.video/share/JDDNNAzrycqzH8K3ehorHPZhJArJCwk8?tab=summary&timestamp=205.0)

### Current Engagement Review

  - [Teero is receiving good output and results from the current editorial program](https://fathom.video/share/JDDNNAzrycqzH8K3ehorHPZhJArJCwk8?tab=summary&timestamp=139.0)
  - [Traffic growth is healthy, reaching nearly 500 clicks per week](https://fathom.video/share/JDDNNAzrycqzH8K3ehorHPZhJArJCwk8?tab=summary&timestamp=1405.0)
  - [Concerns about ROI if focusing solely on editorial content at $9K/month](https://fathom.video/share/JDDNNAzrycqzH8K3ehorHPZhJArJCwk8?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)

### Proposed Expanded Services

1.  Editorial Content: Continue current efforts with flexibility to adjust volume
2.  Programmatic SEO:
      - [Offered at $12K/month standalone (1,200 pages/year)](https://fathom.video/share/JDDNNAzrycqzH8K3ehorHPZhJArJCwk8?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
      - [Examples include salary calculators, job listings, and location-based content](https://fathom.video/share/JDDNNAzrycqzH8K3ehorHPZhJArJCwk8?tab=summary&timestamp=1898.0)
3.  Lead Magnets:
      - [Create assets like hiring guides in PDF format](https://fathom.video/share/JDDNNAzrycqzH8K3ehorHPZhJArJCwk8?tab=summary&timestamp=1511.0)
      - [Implement exit pop-ups and intent pop-ups to capture leads](https://fathom.video/share/JDDNNAzrycqzH8K3ehorHPZhJArJCwk8?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)

### Programmatic SEO Discussion

  - [GrowthX can handle end-to-end process, including data scraping, content creation, and QA](https://fathom.video/share/JDDNNAzrycqzH8K3ehorHPZhJArJCwk8?tab=summary&timestamp=1813.0)
  - [Emphasis on building topical authority and creating compounding impact](https://fathom.video/share/JDDNNAzrycqzH8K3ehorHPZhJArJCwk8?tab=summary&timestamp=1851.0)
  - [Teero expressed interest but needs more concrete examples and clarity on implementation](https://fathom.video/share/JDDNNAzrycqzH8K3ehorHPZhJArJCwk8?tab=summary&timestamp=1761.0)

### Next Steps for Conversion Optimization

  - [Implement lead magnets to capture and de-anonymize website visitors](https://fathom.video/share/JDDNNAzrycqzH8K3ehorHPZhJArJCwk8?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [Explore opportunities to drive more conversions from existing traffic](https://fathom.video/share/JDDNNAzrycqzH8K3ehorHPZhJArJCwk8?tab=summary&timestamp=1355.0)
  - [Continue iterating and learning from user engagement signals](https://fathom.video/share/JDDNNAzrycqzH8K3ehorHPZhJArJCwk8?tab=summary&timestamp=1396.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to send more examples of programmatic SEO implementations](https://fathom.video/share/JDDNNAzrycqzH8K3ehorHPZhJArJCwk8?tab=summary&timestamp=1960.0)
  - [Provide estimates on potential volume opportunities for Teero](https://fathom.video/share/JDDNNAzrycqzH8K3ehorHPZhJArJCwk8?tab=summary&timestamp=1962.0)
  - [GrowthX to create a more detailed proposal for the $18K/month package](https://fathom.video/share/JDDNNAzrycqzH8K3ehorHPZhJArJCwk8?tab=summary&timestamp=1625.0)
  - [Teero to review examples and consider the expanded service offering](https://fathom.video/share/JDDNNAzrycqzH8K3ehorHPZhJArJCwk8?tab=summary&timestamp=1945.0)
  - [Schedule a follow-up discussion to address any remaining questions and potentially finalize the new engagement](https://fathom.video/share/JDDNNAzrycqzH8K3ehorHPZhJArJCwk8?tab=summary&timestamp=1979.0)
